# Nejvýhodnější Rychlý Internet | Optické Sítě ve Vašem Městě

> Rychlé a spolehlivé optické připojení pro vaše město. Gigabitový internet až 1000 Mbps s TV zdarma a profesionální instalací.

## About

Popri.cz nabízí vysokorychlostní gigabitové internetové připojení (až 1000 Mbps) s IPTV zdarma v Ostravě a okolí.

## Services

### High-Speed Internet
- Gigabit internet connectivity up to 1000 Mbps
- Stable fiber-optic GPON technology
- Unlimited data with no fair-use policy restrictions
- 24/7 customer support
- Fast installation (typically within 5-7 days)

### Free IPTV
- 160+ TV channels included free with internet packages
- Full HD and 4K streaming quality
- No additional fees for TV service
- Access to premium sports and entertainment channels

### Service Areas
- Ostrava (all districts including Poruba, Moravská Ostrava, Slezská Ostrava)
- Havířov
- Karviná
- Bohumín
- Surrounding municipalities in the Moravian-Silesian region

## Technology

- GPON (Gigabit Passive Optical Network) fiber-optic technology
- 60 GHz wireless technology in select areas (Polanka nad Odrou)
- Symmetric upload/download speeds
- Low latency for gaming and video conferencing

## Contact

- Website: https://www.popri.cz
- Phone: +420 730 431 313
- Email: info@popri.cz
- Service area: Czech Republic (Moravian-Silesian region)

## Pricing

- Tariff 300 Mbps: 300 CZK/month + 160+ TV channels free
- Tariff 600 Mbps: 400 CZK/month + 160+ TV channels free
- Tariff 1000 Mbps: 490 CZK/month + 160+ TV channels free
- Installation: 300 CZK one-time fee
- Router included free with installation

## Content Structure

The website includes:
- /tarify - Detailed pricing and package comparison
- /iptv - TV channel list and streaming information
- /blog - Technical guides, service comparisons, and local availability
  - /blog/home-office-2025-nastaveni-domaci-kancelare-produktivita - Home office setup guide
  - /blog/jak-zlepsit-wifi-signal-doma-10-overenych-triku-2025 - WiFi signal optimization
  - /blog/o2-nej-prevzatie-poda-alternativa-zakaznici - O2 Nej.cz transition guide
  - /blog/polanka-nad-odrou-60ghz-pripojeni-2025 - 60GHz technology overview
  - /blog/nejlepsi-internet-ostrava-karvina-havirov-pruvodce-2025 - Regional internet guide
- /internet-ostrava - Ostrava-specific service information
- /internet-havirov - Havířov-specific service information
- /internet-karvina - Karviná-specific service information
- /internet-bohumin - Bohumín-specific service information

## Keywords

Primary: PODA internet, gigabit internet, fiber optic Czech Republic, internet Ostrava
Secondary: IPTV free, unlimited internet, GPON technology, internet provider Moravian-Silesian region
